items.title: Dozers Market to reach $22.3 Bn by 2032, Says Global Market Insights Inc.
items.author: Global Market Insights Inc.
items.description: The dozers market is predicted to reach USD 22.3 billion by 2032, driven by the surge in infrastructure development and urbanization. The rising demand for essential minerals and metals is also boosting mining activities, contributing to the growing adoption of high-capacity and specialized dozers.
